name: Calibration-First Reward-Component Auditing for Reinforcement Learning Control in Smart Greenhouses
summary: arXiv:2607.11959v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Greenhouse reinforcement learning can test climate-control ideas at a speed and scale that is difficult to achieve with crop experiments alone. For s...
description: arXiv:2607.11959v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Greenhouse reinforcement learning can test climate-control ideas at a speed and scale that is difficult to achieve with crop experiments alone. For smart-greenhouse control, however, a single simulator return is not enough: a grower or control engineer also needs to know when the policy heats, enriches CO2, vents, manages humidity, deploys screens...
author: Yuhui Bie, Guowei Xu, Yaojun Wang
